notes: First time running directx will complain not compatible, then game wont start - eib.exe gets stuck in processes, just kill the eib.exe then exit out of steam client, then load game again no issues after that.
title: Brothers in Arms: Earned in Blood™

notes: No issues. All works fine. There's no multiplayer option (old game) but can create LAN games. Story mode was played in maximum resolution (1920x1080) and the voices, music and effects are clear.
title: Brothers in Arms: Earned in Blood™

notes: DirectX installation fails, says not compatible with this version of windows. But seems to be OK after this, unlike an earlier review, it did launch. Starting the game again it no longer complains. In game otherwise seems the same as the first game, Road to Hill 30.
title: Brothers in Arms: Earned in Blood™
